# SBDC Technology Commercialization Routing Process

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

## When to route Route to Technology Commercialization for high-tech innovation, product commercialization, prototyping/testing, SBIR/STTR exploration, investor or grant proposal readiness, licensing, and presentation readiness. ## Best-fit users

## When to surface

Route to Technology Commercialization for high-tech innovation, product commercialization, prototyping/testing, SBIR/STTR exploration, investor or grant proposal readiness, licensing, and presentation readiness.

## Key information

- ## When to route
- Route to Technology Commercialization for high-tech innovation, product commercialization, prototyping/testing, SBIR/STTR exploration, investor or grant proposal readiness, licensing, and presentation readiness.
- ## Best-fit users
- Founder with a technology, patentable product, research-based product, or advanced innovation.
- Entrepreneur needing help evaluating market viability and commercialization path.
- Existing business seeking SBIR/STTR, licensing, or technology funding strategy.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
